Any uses of `InterfaceAccount` allows another unexpected account type to be passed, after https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/pull/3837 disabled discriminator checking for this type.

The bug was originally reported and fixed in https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/pull/4139, see that PR for more details.

### Patches
https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/pull/4139 patched the issue and was released in `1.0.0-rc.2`. Users should upgrade to the latest released version of Anchor 1.0.

### References
Bug landed in: https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/pull/3837
Bug fixed in: https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/pull/4139", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-429q-fhh4-r6hj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-13T15:33:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-429q-fhh4-r6hj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-429q-fhh4-r6hj"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-13T15:33:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/security/advisories/GHSA-429q-fhh4-r6hj", "https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/pull/3837", "https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/pull/4139", "https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor/commit/26ef36968a62e28a1f028e7adae4806af30c747d", "https://github.com/otter-sec/anchor/security/advisories/GHSA-429q-fhh4-r6hj", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0146.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-429q-fhh4-r6hj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/otter-sec/anchor/security-advisories/GHSA-429q-fhh4-r6hj", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/solana-foundation/anchor", "summary": "Anchor: `InterfaceAccount` allows account substitution between unexpected types", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T20:18:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-429q-fhh4-r6hj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.0.0-rc.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "anchor-lang"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 1.0.0-rc.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Anchor: `InterfaceAccount` allows account substitution between unexpected types
